task_summary: Add a fixture-only desk-view-model bridge to isolated mew-ghost with static --desk-json loading, desk pet-state presence mapping, dry-run primary_action intent rendering, bounded watch rebuilds, focused tests, and README usage.
tests_run: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --desk-json experiments/mew-ghost/fixtures/sample_desk_view.json --format state

UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --desk-json experiments/mew-ghost/fixtures/sample_desk_view.json --format html --output /tmp/mew-ghost-desk-review.html --watch-count 2 --interval 0
notes: SP17 keeps mew-ghost isolated under experiments/mew-ghost. The desk bridge loads only static --desk-json fixtures, maps sleeping/thinking/typing/alerting into separate desk presence metadata without replacing active-window classification, renders desk status/counts/details/primary_action in JSON and HTML, and exposes desk primary_action as a non-executable dry-run intent beside mew chat and mew code. Watch mode reloads the desk fixture every iteration. Real live .mew state, core src/mew imports, real desk command execution, and real mew subprocess execution remain intentionally outside automation. The one verifier failure was canonical report schema closeout for an empty failure_class, repaired in the report only. reviewer_followup: session 37 updated prior-slice closeout schema/docstring/HTML/test wording to SP17/sp17 after the desk bridge state shape landed; rescue_edits remains 0 because no operator product-code rescue edits were required.
